title: Scalable Inference Clusters
description: Architect scalable inference clusters by evaluating serving frameworks such as vLLM, TGI, and Triton. Implement Continuous Batching to maximize GPU utilization and inference throughput.
objectives: Architect scalable inference clusters by evaluating serving frameworks such as vLLM, TGI, and Triton.
Implement Continuous Batching to maximize GPU utilization and inference throughput.
